sections.paragraph:
Original: עדה עדא

Transliteration: ‛ădâ' ‛ădâh

Phonetic: ad-aw'

BDB Definition:

  1. to pass on, pass away
    1. (Peal)
      1. to pass on, pass over
      2. to pass away
    2. (Aphel) to take away, remove, depose

Origin: corresponding to H5710

TWOT entry: 2898

Part(s) of speech: Verb
